creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #3)
Thank you for committing my patch to multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass!

Could you please have a look at bug #263092 for multimedia/plexmediaserver to update as well. I plan to try and submit patches to keep both these ports up to date in the future.

Thank you again for your time.

Ben
